info.title: Digital Marketing Simulation Lab API
info.description: API documentation for Digital Marketing Simulation Lab backend

post.summary: Sign up a new user using email and password
Sign in an existing user using email and password

get.description: Get current user session information

put.description: Update current user's profile display name and personal details

post.description: Associates a student to a class room via class invite code
Allows administrators to reassign user system roles

get.description: Lists all users in the system (Admin only)

post.description: Suspends a user account (Admin only)
Activates a suspended user account (Admin only)
Provisions a new user account (Admin only)
Approves a pending student (Instructor or Admin)
Removes a student from a class cohort (Instructor or Admin)
Resets/reinitializes a student's active simulation
Provisions a new billing/pricing plan (Admin only)

put.description: Updates details of an existing billing plan (Admin only)

get.description: Retrieve subscription reports with status and search filters (Admin only)

post.description: Creates a simulation state for the student user
Sets up or resets a sandbox simulation with a chosen path

get.description: Returns simulation state details by ID

post.description: Saves SEO, Google Ads, and Meta Ads decisions in one unified call
Locks and processes the round for the given simulation ID

get.description: Returns DailyMetrics for the simulation
Returns all RoundSnapshot audit data for the simulation
Returns keyword list with industry/search filters
Returns SEO metrics (DA, PA, keyword rankings) for the simulation
Returns Google Ads keyword benchmarks (average CPC, competition index)

post.description: Saves Google Ads campaign decisions specifically

get.description: Returns aggregated Google Ads metrics for the simulation
Returns seeded Meta Ads target interest audiences and sizes
Returns seeded Meta Ads placements and baseline CPM values
Returns aggregated Meta Ads metrics for the simulation

post.description: Creates a class room cohort

get.description: Lists instructor's classes, or student's enrolled class
Returns students enrolled in the class room

post.description: Resets all student simulations in that class room
Creates a new scenario template

get.description: Returns details of a scenario template by ID
Returns audit trail of decisions for the simulation
Returns cohort comparison metrics for a student

post.description: Checks certificate eligibility for the current simulation state
Issues a certificate and generates PDF if student is eligible

get.description: Public validation route for certificate verification, exposes no private scores
Aggregates organic traffic and keywords targeted for reports
Aggregates spend, conversions, CPC, and CTR across Google and Meta Ads
Calculates channel conversions contribution % and marketing funnel
Lists triggered market events for the simulation
Returns seeded probability list of scenario market events

post.description: Manually triggers a market event injection for all active simulations in a class cohort
Generates a platform-specific AI insight for a simulation round

get.description: Returns remaining seconds to next round result availability
Returns progress tracking checklist for class students
Returns leaderboard rankings for class
Returns audit trail of decisions for all classroom members
Returns scenario settings configuration details

post.description: Starts a student simulation for scenario ID
